title: vigna frutescens subsp. frutescens
intro: Vigna frutescens subsp. frutescens, also known as horse gram, is a type of legume native to the Indian subcontinent and Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce blood sugar levels and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Vigna frutescens subsp. frutescens include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing inflammation, and aiding in weight management, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of horse gram include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed as a supplement or used in cooking.
